scripts.mongo:start: docker start carrera-run-mongo || docker run -d --name carrera-run-mongo -p 27017:27017 mongo:7
scripts.ollama:start: docker start carrera-run-ollama || docker run -d --name carrera-run-ollama -p 11434:11434 -v ollama:/root/.ollama ollama/ollama
scripts.dev:local: npm run mongo:start && npm run ollama:start && STRAVA_MOCK=true npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @carrera-run/api && npm run build --workspace @carrera-run/web
